name: Asad Mehmood
key_statements: I reported my access card as lost to the admin office on 13 November 2024
I have no knowledge of the GPU theft
I received the delivery of four hard drives on 28 October 2024 and placed them in the equipment locker
behavioral_flags: reported access card as lost, which was later used to access the lab
timeline_presence: 21:47, Lab 3B (access card used, but claimed to be lost)

name: Zara Qureshi
role_in_case: MS Research Student, person of interest
key_statements: I was in the lab from 2:00 PM until 7:00 PM on 14 November 2024
I helped Dr. Imran write the justification for the purchase of four hard drives, but we only needed two
The GPU cards were fully installed and functioning when I left the lab at 7:00 PM

name: Hamza Tariq
role_in_case: Final Year Project student, person of interest
key_statements: I was in the lab from 1:00 PM and left at exactly 6:15 PM on 14 November 2024
I came back to the building at around 9:30 PM to collect my charger, but did not go to Lab 3B
I have no access card for Lab 3B and have no idea how to remove GPU cards
behavioral_flags: entered the building at 9:40 PM and left at 10:05 PM with a heavier backpack
timeline_presence: 9:30 PM - 10:05 PM, Block C main entrance

name: Dr. Imran Siddiqui
key_statements: none directly quoted, but reported the incident and the missing GPU cards

name: Danish Raza
known_associations: Hamza Tariq - observed entering and leaving the building
key_statements: I saw Hamza Tariq enter the building at 9:40 PM and leave at 10:05 PM with a heavier backpack
timeline_presence: 8:00 PM - 10:05 PM, Block C main entrance

name: Sana Mir
known_associations: Asad Mehmood - observed in the corridor outside Lab 3B
key_statements: I heard metallic scraping or clicking sounds from Lab 3B at around 9:50 PM
I saw Asad Mehmood in the corridor outside Lab 3B at around 7:30 PM
